Author: meowmeowmeowie1
Name: MyTweak
Punchline: Job rotation toggles + KBM press mirror.
Description: Job rotation toggles and a keyboard/mouse action-press mirror. Includes a master kill-switch (/mytweak disable) and a floating status overlay showing MyTweak ON/DISABLED and Burst ARMED/HELD for the current job. Click the overlay lines to toggle. /mytweak burst hold uses per-job preset codes. New: a Next Action Tracker window (/mytweak tracker) showing the next ST + AoE action and burst state for your job, plus a controller cross-hotbar (WXHB) selection mirror.
Changelog: v1.0.6.7: Next Action Tracker can be dragged onto a second monitor as its own OS window so game-capture recorders (Medal/Discord) won't record it; when detached it also sets WDA_EXCLUDEFROMCAPTURE so screen capture skips it. v1.0.6.6: tracker is a visible movable window, revealed once on upgrade.
